definition.description: Clear the expanse state, removing all current images.
definition.name: Clear Expanse

definition.description: Set illumination intensity for a specific channel.
definition.name: Set Illumination Intensity

definition.description: A long-running function to test optimistic updates and progress.
definition.name: Long Stuff Running

definition.description: Turn on a specific illumination channel.
definition.name: Turn On Illumination

args.label: intensity
args.description: Optional intensity to set. Uses current/default if not provided.

definition.description: Turn off a specific illumination channel.
definition.name: Turn Off Illumination Channel

args.label: channel
args.description: Illumination channel number to turn off

definition.description: A function that always fails to test lock release.
definition.name: Failing Camera

optimistics.accessor: ({...state, x: args.x, y: args.y, z: args.z, a: args.a})

definition.description: Move the stage to a new position.
definition.name: Move Stage

args.label: is_absolute
args.description: If True, move to absolute position; if False, relative move

args.label: step_size
args.description: Step size in micrometers for movement simulation (default: 1.0)

definition.description: Move stage to home position.
definition.name: Move Home

definition.description: Move the stage to a specified position with a long execution time to test optimistic updates.
definition.name: Kill Benedict

definition.description: Move the stage to a specified position.
definition.name: Move To Stage Position

definition.description: Capture an image from the detector and save it to disk.
definition.name: Capture Image

children.description: Represents a single 3D volume captured by the detector.
Represents a scale factor for a 3D volume.

definition.description: Dump the current states of all managers for debugging purposes.
definition.name: Dump States To Stdin

definition.description:
Call this to begin streaming frames captured by the detector
to connected video clients.
definition.name: Start broadcasting frames to the video WebSocket endpoint.

definition.description:
Call this to stop streaming frames captured by the detector
to connected video clients.
definition.name: Stop broadcasting frames to the video WebSocket endpoint.

definition.description: Activate a detector by its slot number.
definition.name: Activate Detector

definition.description: Deactivate a detector by its slot number.
definition.name: Deactivate Detector

definition.description: Update detector settings.
definition.name: Update Detector

definition.description: A function that never ends to test how the system handles long-running functions.
definition.name: Never Ending Function

definition.description: Switch to a specific objective slot.
definition.name: Switch Objective

definition.description: Toggle to the next objective in the turret.
definition.name: Toggle Objective

definition.description: Switch to a specific filter slot.
definition.name: Switch Filter

definition.description: Toggle to the next filter in the wheel.
definition.name: Toggle Filter

definition.description: Simulate the acquisition of a multidimensional dataset based on the provided configuration.
definition.name: Acquire Multidimensional Acquisition

validators.errorMessage: You need at least one timepoint to perform an acquisition

children.description: List of timepoints to acquire, each with its own stage positions and hooks
Represents a timepoint in a temporal sequence.
Absolute time to acquire this timepoint (e.g., '2024-01-01T12:00:00') or None to acquire immediately after the previous timepoint
List of stage positions to acquire at this timepoint
Represents a position in 3D space.
Represents a stack of images at different z-slices.
Represents which channels to acquire at each position.
Name or slot of the detector to use for this stream (e.g., 'Camera1' or '1')
Mapping name for this stream (e.g., 'GFP', 'RFP') to be used in file naming and metadata

validators.errorMessage: We need at least one illumination channel to acquire this stream

children.description: List of illuminations to use for this stream (e.g., [{'source': 'LED1', 'wavelength': 488, 'intensity': 0.8}])
Represents an illumination channel to acquire.
List of hooks to execute at each z-slice (e.g., 'autofocus', 'z_calibration')
Data class representing a software autofocus hook to be executed during acquisition.
Data class representing a z-calibration hook to be executed during acquisition.
List of hooks to execute at each position (e.g., 'autofocus', 'z_calibration')
Data class representing a software autofocus hook to be executed during acquisition.
Data class representing a z-calibration hook to be executed during acquisition.
Order in which to visit stage positions (e.g., 'sequential', 'random')
List of hooks to execute at each timepoint (e.g., 'autofocus', 'z_calibration')
Data class representing a software autofocus hook to be executed during acquisition.
Data class representing a z-calibration hook to be executed during acquisition.
Base file name for acquired images (e.g., 'experiment1')
File format for saving acquired images (e.g., 'TIFF', 'PNG')
List of hooks to execute at the start of the acquisition (e.g., 'autofocus', 'z_calibration')
Data class representing a software autofocus hook to be executed during acquisition.
Data class representing a z-calibration hook to be executed during acquisition.

returns.label: return0
returns.description: List of acquired images with metadata.

ports.description: List of registered step sizes for the stage.

children.description:
Shared state for illumination parameters.

    Note: intensity is divided by 1000 in the detector for actual scaling,
    so 10000.0 gives an effective intensity of 10.0.
Shared state for detector parameters.
Configuration for a single objective lens.

Configuration for a single optical filter.

    Attributes:
        slot: Filter wheel slot number.
        name: Human-readable filter name.
        center_wavelength: Center wavelength of the filter passband (nm).
        bandwidth: Full width at half maximum of the passband (nm).
        transmission: Peak transmission efficiency (0.0 to 1.0).
        is_active: Whether this filter is currently in the light path.
Data class representing the light path used for an image, including illumination settings.
Slot number of the detector in the current light path configuration, used to determine which detector's metadata to include in the light path state
